Catalog/Infection Prevention/BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Hand Rub
Infection PreventionREF: MRL-IPR-004

BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Hand Rub

BAKTIO BLUE · Hand Hygiene

BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Rub is a broad-spectrum hand disinfectant providing rapid bactericidal, virucidal, and tuberculocidal action for healthcare professionals. This alcohol-based solution delivers effective hygienic disinfection in 30 seconds and surgical-grade disinfection in 1.5 minutes. With proven efficacy against bacteria, yeasts, tuberculosis, mycobacteria, and viruses, it ensures optimal infection control in clinical environments. The precise application volumes (3ml hygienic, 6ml surgical) provide cost-effective dosing for hospital protocols.

MaterialAlcohol-based solution
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Rub is a broad-spectrum hand disinfectant providing rapid bactericidal, virucidal, and tuberculocidal action for healthcare professionals. This alcohol-based solution delivers effective hygienic disinfection in 30 seconds and surgical-grade disinfection in 1.5 minutes. With proven efficacy against bacteria, yeasts, tuberculosis, mycobacteria, and viruses, it ensures optimal infection control in clinical environments. The precise application volumes (3ml hygienic, 6ml surgical) provide cost-effective dosing for hospital protocols.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Hand Rub, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The BAKTIO BLUE Alcohol Hand Rub is constructed using Alcohol-based solution, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
